title: Sing a Song of Sex
writer: Tomomichi Soeda, Tsutomu Tamura, Mamoru Sasaki
actors: Ichirô Araki, Kazuko Tajima, Jûzô Itami
plot: Four high school students preparing for their university entrance exam fantasize about a classmate, and meet up with their inebriated teacher, while singing bawdy drinking songs.
